hero.subheadline: HireNP automates shortlisting, scheduling, and communication — so your HR team focuses on people, not paperwork.
problem.1: CVs scattered across email and WhatsApp
problem.3: Good candidates lost to slow follow-up
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: AI prepares. You decide. Always in control.
howItWorks.step1.title: Post your job
howItWorks.step1.desc: You post, candidates apply through HireNP.
howItWorks.step2.title: AI does the work
howItWorks.step2.desc: Shortlists, ranks, drafts emails, books interviews.
howItWorks.step3.title: You just confirm
howItWorks.step3.desc: HR reviews and approves with one click.
features.title: Everything you need to hire smarter
features.subtitle: Built for how Nepali companies actually work.
features.1.title: AI Candidate Shortlisting
features.1.desc: Ranks applicants by skills, experience, and job fit automatically.
features.2.title: Automated Interview Scheduling
features.2.desc: AI coordinates calendars and books interview slots for you.
features.3.title: AI-Drafted Communications
features.3.desc: Personalized emails and messages written and managed by AI.
features.4.title: WhatsApp & Email Notifications
features.4.desc: Reach candidates where they are — WhatsApp and email built in.
features.5.title: Offer Letter Generator
features.5.desc: Generate professional offer letters with one click.
features.6.title: Job Description Writer
features.6.desc: AI writes clear, compelling JDs tailored to your role.
whoItsFor.title: Built for teams like yours
whoItsFor.subtitle: From startups to institutions — HireNP adapts to your workflow.
whoItsFor.1.title: IT & Tech Companies
whoItsFor.1.desc: Hire engineers fast, without drowning in CVs.
whoItsFor.2.title: Banks & Microfinance
whoItsFor.2.desc: Handle volume hiring without adding HR headcount.
whoItsFor.3.title: NGOs & INGOs
whoItsFor.3.desc: Professional hiring process that matches your standards.
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.free.name: Free forever
pricing.free.label: No credit card. No expiry.
pricing.free.f1: 1 active job post at a time
pricing.perjob.name: Pay per job
pricing.perjob.label: Active for 60 days. No subscription needed.
pricing.perjob.f1: Full AI candidate shortlisting and ranking
pricing.perjob.f6: No monthly commitment — pay only when you hire
pricing.monthly.name: Monthly
pricing.monthly.label: Saves money from job #4 onwards.
pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
pricing.math: Hiring 4 or more people a month? The monthly plan at NPR 8,000 costs less than 4 individual job posts. Do the math.
pricing.fine1: All plans include a 30-day free trial except Free tier.
pricing.fine2: Pay annually on the Monthly plan and get 2 months free.
pricing.fine3: Refer another company and get NPR 2,000 off your next payment.
pricing.branding: Emails, interview invites, and offer letters sent through HireNP carry our branding on all plans. This is how HireNP works — and how great candidates discover great companies are using it.
trust.quote: Built for Nepal. Designed around how Nepali companies actually hire — with WhatsApp notifications, Nepali salary benchmarks, and a human always in the loop.
finalCta.headline: Ready to hire smarter?
footer.desc: AI-powered hiring OS built for Nepali companies. Post a job, get applicants, and let AI handle the rest.
